selected_plan.title: Define the Uigwe wrapper surface without changing the core protocol
selected_plan.summary: Add the documentation and contract pieces needed for a future wrapper while keeping the current planner and consumer artifacts stable.

retained_alternatives.title: Keep everything inside PROTOCOL.md only
retained_alternatives.summary: Avoid a dedicated wrapper document and extend protocol guidance instead.
cons: Weaker separation between planner and wrapper surface

leaf_tasks.title: Write the wrapper surface draft
leaf_tasks.description: Document wrapper purpose, entry modes, inputs, outputs, and non-goals.
leaf_tasks.why: A future wrapper needs a clear contract before implementation starts.
done_criteria: Planner and wrapper boundaries are explicit

verification.description: Confirm the wrapper doc does not redefine core protocol responsibilities.

leaf_tasks.title: Define the wrapper input and output contract
leaf_tasks.description: Draft a machine-facing schema for future wrapper requests and wrapper outputs.
leaf_tasks.why: The wrapper should be able to pass through Uigwe packets and outputs without inventing a vague ad-hoc surface.
done_criteria: Wrapper input and output fields are explicit
The contract refers to existing Uigwe artifacts rather than replacing them

verification.description: Check the wrapper schema for compatibility with existing packet and goal-tree contracts.

leaf_tasks.title: Integrate the wrapper surface into the Uigwe docs package
leaf_tasks.description: Update the Uigwe docs index and cross-links so the wrapper surface is discoverable and properly bounded.
leaf_tasks.why: Brownfield work should fit the existing docs package cleanly instead of creating isolated artifacts.
done_criteria: Uigwe docs index links to the wrapper surface
Cross-links point from protocol docs to wrapper docs where appropriate

verification.description: Confirm the wrapper surface is discoverable without duplicating protocol definitions.

risk_summary.description: The wrapper spec may accidentally redefine core protocol responsibilities.
risk_summary.mitigation: Add explicit planner vs wrapper boundary language.

risk_summary.description: The new surface may fragment the docs package if linked poorly.
risk_summary.mitigation: Update the docs index and cross-link from protocol surfaces.
